title: Preview: Stockport County vs Wycombe Wanderers - prediction, team news, lineups
text: Stockport County will host Wycombe Wanderers at Edgeley Park on Friday. Stockport currently sits fifth in League One, three points clear of seventh place, while Wycombe occupy eighth, just two points outside the playoff positions. Recent Form — Stockport come off a convincing 3-0 victory over Wimbledon, with manager Dave Challinor praising the ruthless nature of the performance. Wycombe rebounded from a disappointing loss to Leyton Orient with a dominant 4-0 win over Port Vale. Key Players — Kyle Wootton has been instrumental for Stockport this season as the division's second-leading goalscorer with 19 goals across 38 appearances. Wycombe's attacking threats include Cauley Woodrow, Connor Taylor, and Fred Onyedinma. Team News & Injuries — Stockport may require adjustments after Adama Sidibeh sustained a knock against Wimbledon. Wootton is expected to replace him in the lineup. Wycombe are unlikely to make changes following their Port Vale victory, with Nathan Lowe expected to lead the attack. Predicted Lineups — Stockport: Addai; Dacres-Cogley, Olowu, Pye, Osborn; Norwood, Bate; Diamond, Wootton, Stokes; Olaofe. Wycombe: Norris; Huggins, Grimmer, Taylor, Harvie; Boyd-Munce, Morley; Onyedinma, Woodrow, Vidigal; Lowe. Sports Mole predicts a Stockport County 2-1 victory, citing superior form and Wycombe's poor away record this season.
